observations.note: Step 0 anti-gaming validation PASSED. No skip decorators, empty tests, TODO/FIXME placeholders, or excessive mocking detected.
All 35 unit tests PASSED (11 + 7 + 6 + 5 + 6). Test suite: tests/STORY-532/run_all_tests.sh executed successfully with 100% pass rate.
Reference file located at src/claude/skills/planning-business/references/milestone-generator.md (245 lines). Correctly positioned in src/ tree for planning-business skill.
12 YAML blocks detected and validated. All blocks parse successfully with standard Python YAML parser. Schema compliance: 100%.

Verified: exactly 10 milestones (AC#1), first='Problem Validated', last='Launch Ready'. All 6 required fields present in each milestone (name, definition, soft_timeframe, micro_tasks, validation_gate, celebration).
All 3 guard rails documented: 7-day minimum per milestone, 180-day soft total cap, recalibration_trigger condition (total_days > 180). Guard rail section is complete and enforceable.
Idempotent re-generation mechanism clearly documented with 4-step procedure: check exists -> backup to .bak -> regenerate -> write. Backup-before-overwrite ordering prevents data loss (AC#4).
Missing user-profile.yaml handling documented. Error message 'User profile not found. Run the user-profile phase first.' specified. No file creation on error condition (AC#3).

All 10 validation gates use concrete, binary pass/fail criteria. Zero instances of vague language. Examples: '5 interviews completed with documented pain points', 'Feature list exists with 5 or fewer must-haves' (AC#5).
Complete workflow documented: profile dependency -> guard rails validation -> milestone schema generation -> backup mechanism. All 5 AC requirements have clear integration paths.
All 5 acceptance criteria verified and integrated: AC#1 (10 milestones, boundaries), AC#2 (guard rails), AC#3 (missing profile), AC#4 (idempotent backup), AC#5 (validation gates).

summary.overall_verdict: PASS - All integration tests passed. File structure, YAML compliance, schema consistency, guard rails, backup mechanism, error handling, and validation gate specificity all verified and documented correctly.
